name: Prem Mohan Tewari (PremBrij)
description: My Nannoo (my mom's dad). I've known him since I was born, and he's the one who gave me my name. He's never said 'no' to me and has always been there for the family. He started blogging on WordPress over five years ago, and has since moved to a website (built by yours truly) where he showcases his poems, published articles and Smule karaoke. His blog exists under the pen name "PremBrij", which is a combination of him and his father's name. Go visit his blog!

thing.description: Coolest Grandfather Ever & Author of PremBrij
